prompt: Editorial close-up photograph of a Thai foot reflexology setup at a garden spa in Rawai, Phuket — bare feet resting on a cream linen cushion beside a wooden bowl of warm water with floating frangipani flowers, a small pot of balm and a smooth bamboo pressure stick, soft natural light filtering through palm leaves, muted terracotta, sage green and warm cream palette, shot on film, shallow depth of field, no faces, calm and inviting.
